mva.explanation: MVA ratio λ_int/λ_min=2.48. Reliable normal direction.

bz_status.label: Northward
bz_status.explanation: Bz=+3.8 nT — magnetopause closed. Minimal geomagnetic coupling.

axes.y: Particle energy [eV] — log scale, 20 keV to 6 MeV/n
axes.color: log₁₀ differential flux [particles cm⁻² s⁻¹ sr⁻¹ eV⁻¹]
axes.bright: Bright streaks = solar energetic particle (SEP) events

axes.y: PSD [(nT)² Hz⁻¹] — power spectral density of |B| fluctuations

psd.interpretation: Spectral index α=-0.03. Kolmogorov MHD turbulence predicts −1.67. Shallower → energy injection from shocks or CMEs.

explanations.beta: β=0.963 — thermal/magnetic pressure ratio. Magnetically dominated (β<1) — Alfvén modes propagate.
explanations.alfven: V_A=43.4 km/s — Alfvén wave speed along field lines.
explanations.mach_a: M_A=9.50 — flow/Alfvén speed ratio. Super-Alfvénic — bow shock forms.
explanations.mach_s: M_s=3684019446837.80 — flow/sound speed ratio. Supersonic — shocks possible.
